title: Pseudoduganella rhizocola sp. nov., Isolated from Rhizospheric Soil.
author_string: Chegini, Shakiba S, Jayan, Jaincy N, Kim, Yong Ho, Srinivasan, Sathiyaraj, Lee, Sang-Seob
abstract: A novel bacterial strain, SM-13<sup> T</sup> was isolated from the rhizospheric soil of Epipremnum aureum (Jade Pothos) sampled in Suwon, Republic of Korea. The isolate was Gram-stain-negative, aerobic, motile, rod-shaped, cream-coloured, oxidase- and catalase-positive. Strain SM-13<sup> T</sup> grew at the range of 15-37 °C (optimum, 25 °C), at pH 6.0-9.0 (optimum, pH 7.0), and in the presence of 0-0.5% (w/v) NaCl (optimum, 0%). Phylogenetic analysis based on genome and 16S rRNA gene sequences indicated that strain SM-13<sup> T</sup> was affiliated with the family Oxalobacteriaceae and most closely related to Pseudoduganella humi THG S6-8<sup> T</sup> (97.8%), Pseudoduganella violacea CAVIO<sup>T</sup> (97.7%), Pseudoduganella buxea A9<sup>T</sup> (97.6%), Pseudoduganella dura 16<sup> T</sup> (97.5%), Pseudoduganella umbonata LP01<sup>T</sup> (97.5%), and Pseudoduganella lurida D5<sup>T</sup> (97.4%). The major ubiquinone was Q-8. The major identified polar lipids were phosphatidylethanolamine (PE), phosphatidylglycerol (PG), diphosphatidylglycerol (DPG), amino lipids (AL), and unknown lipids (L1, L2). The major fatty acids of SM-13<sup> T</sup> were summed feature 3 (C<sub>16:1</sub> ω7c/C<sub>16:1</sub> ω6c) (51.9%) and C<sub>16: 0</sub> (18.7%). The novel strain SM-13<sup> T</sup> has a draft genome size of 5,401,088 bp (27 contigs), annotated with 4,880 protein-coding genes, 59 tRNA and 2 rRNA genes. The genomic DNA G + C (%) content was 64. Hence, the strain SM-13<sup> T</sup> represent a novel species within the genus Pseudoduganella, for which the name Pseudoduganella rhizocola sp. nov. is proposed. The Type strain is SM-13<sup> T</sup> (= KCTC 8734<sup> T</sup> = TBRC 19389<sup> T</sup> = KEMB 24220<sup> T</sup>). The GenBank/EMBL/DDBJ accession number for the complete 16S rRNA gene and genome sequence of the type strain SM-13<sup> T</sup> is PQ198503 and JBJQIK000000000.
